title: Burney Company | Financial Services for Families and Institutions

meta.og_title: Burney Company | Financial Services for Families and Institutions

headings.text: Work with a nationally recognized team of fiduciaries

body_text:
Burney Company
In 1974, Jack Burney launched one of the first fiduciary investment advisory firms to share his structured investment process to improve investor outcomes. Markets and client demands have evolved with time, but Jack’s core principle remains: empower investors to make more effective investment decisions.
Today, Burney supports you through multiple service offerings:
For individuals and families
Investment Management
Gain access to professionals with decades of investment management expertise. Entrust our team to manage your portfolio with our proprietary, tax-efficient US equity strategy and forward-looking asset allocation models designed to balance risk and return, customized to your personal situation.
Visit burneyinvest.com →
Comprehensive Wealth Management
Build a comprehensive financial strategy focused on attaining your financial goals. This encompasses a range of services including financial planning, investment management, tax planning, estate planning, and retirement planning.
Visit burneywealth.com →
Proactive Tax Planning & Preparation
Elevate your tax experience with proactive tax planning, a seamless tax preparation process, and cohesion between your tax and financial advisory team.
Visit burneytaxadvisors.com →
For firms and institutions
Outsourced CIO & Separately Managed Accounts
For advisors or advisory teams looking to improve their research, stock selection, and portfolio construction.
Visit burneyadvisorservices.com →
Burney U.S. Factor Rotation ETF
Employs our most effective Size and Style Responsive strategy in a tax-efficient ETF wrapper.
Visit burneyetfs.com →
Burney U.S. Equity Select ETF
Focused on Core U.S. equity exposure powered by Burney’s stock selection expertise
Visit burneyetfs.com →
Work with a nationally recognized team of fiduciaries
Click on logos for award criteria.
CNBC FA 100
2019-2025
CNBC’s annual FA 100 ranking was published on 10/1/2025 for the year 2025.  The Burney Company did not pay CNBC any compensation for being considered for the list, however, Burney Company does pay a licensing fee to use the CNBC logo in marketing materials.  A link to the CNBC selection criteria can be found by going to https://www.cnbc.com/2025/10/01/financial-advisor-100-methodology-2025.html. The CNBC award was given to The Burney Company, which includes portfolio managers associated with Burney Wealth Management and nine other affiliated portfolio managers.
Barrons Top 1200
2014-2026
Barrons Top 1200 ranking was published on 3/10/2026 for the year 2026. The Burney Company did not pay Barrons any compensation for being considered for the list, however, Burney Company does pay an annual fee for access to its “Digital Marketing Package” that provides Burney with an upgraded online profile. A link to Barrons selection criteria can be found by going to https://www.barrons.com. The Barrons award was presented to Burney President Lowell Pratt.
